uiDefinition.name: Rare Books Bot
uiDefinition.vision: A single React application that places the conversational discovery bot at the center, with layered access to operator observability, data diagnostics, and administration.

screens.name: Chat
screens.purpose: The product. NL bibliographic discovery with two-phase conversation.

screens.name: Query Debugger
screens.purpose: Test queries, inspect plans, label results, build gold sets. Replaces QA Tool.

featuresToKeep: Evidence display with confidence (from Chat UI)

techRecommendation.justification: 3,160 lines of production-quality React/TypeScript already exist. Team has demonstrated React 19 fluency. React's component model maps naturally to chat-centric UX.
techRecommendation.stateManagement: TanStack Query v5 (server state) + Zustand (client state) + React local state. No Redux.
techRecommendation.routing: React Router v7 with nested routes: / (Chat), /operator/*, /diagnostics/*, /admin/*
techRecommendation.uiFramework: Tailwind CSS v4 + Radix UI for accessible headless primitives
techRecommendation.testing: Vitest + React Testing Library + Playwright E2E + MSW for API mocking
techRecommendation.charting: Recharts v3 (continue). Evaluate Observable Plot or Nivo when complex charts needed.
techRecommendation.apiIntegration: TanStack Query v5 for REST + custom useWebSocket hook for streaming chat

mustHave: Query interpretation transparency with per-filter confidence
Evidence chain per result with MARC field citations
